en: Our debate team is preparing a speech on future energy choices.
zh: 我们辩论队正在准备一场关于未来能源选择的演讲。

en: One student argues that solar power can reduce pressure on cities.
zh: 一位同学认为太阳能可以减轻城市压力。

en: I focus on how technology and policy must develop at the same time.
zh: 我重点讨论技术和政策必须同时发展。
our teacher asks us to revise every weak point.
column4: 讨论结束后，老师要求我们修改每一个薄弱点。
